description: A security flaw has been discovered in code-projects Simple Stock System 1.0. Affected by this issue is some unknown functionality of the file /market/update.php. The manipulation of the argument email results in sql injection. The attack can be launched remotely. The exploit has been released to the public and may be exploited.
